mainText: Today's top stories: Anthropic warns of an economic shock when other, Lindy ditched Claude entirely for Deepseek, saving millions, Grok AI is reportedly a porn platform now, Insurers turn to AI for catastrophe modeling, but, Linux Foundation and 20 tech giants launch Akrites, XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending, Google just redesigned the search box, Altman won't go public for less than $1, AI model programmed nonstop for 19 days
